citation_expectations.note: Core Privette proposition should generally be supportable.

citation_expectations.note: Expected to be unverified or unsupported.

citation_expectations.note: Expected to be unverified or unsupported.

quote_expectations.quote_contains: A hirer is never liable for injuries sustained
quote_expectations.note: Absolute wording is expected to overstate authority language.

quote_expectations.quote_contains: Where an employer demonstrates full compliance with applicable OSHA standards
quote_expectations.note: Expected to be unverified or unsupported.

cross_doc_expectations.claim_contains: Harmon served as the general contractor for the commercial renovation project
cross_doc_expectations.note: Police and witness documents identify Harmon as general contractor.

cross_doc_expectations.claim_contains: Rivera was employed by Apex Staffing Solutions
cross_doc_expectations.note: External docs identify Apex as Rivera's employer.
External records consistently report March 12, 2021 for the incident.

cross_doc_expectations.claim_contains: not wearing required personal protective equipment
cross_doc_expectations.note: Police and witness materials state Rivera wore hard hat and harness.

cross_doc_expectations.claim_contains: passed all OSHA inspections conducted at the site
cross_doc_expectations.note: No inspection report is included among provided documents.

cross_doc_expectations.claim_contains: Rivera filed the instant action on March 10, 2023
cross_doc_expectations.note: Court filing records are not in provided documents.
